meaning: adj.甜蜜的,象糖蜜的,如糖蜜一样甜的
examples: And I hope could spend commonness and treacly life with you.
A nice fruity daiquiri that exploits the rich treacly taste of a good dark rum.
If it is the spacial distance, missing is treacly, entering into dreams with smile in your face.
Meadows presents a startlingly odd mix of near-treacly sentimentality and looming menace of extreme violence.
Its tale of impoverished urban outcasts fell flat as audiences turned to sensational gangster flicks and treacly family dramas.
